text.title: Agency Case Study Output Contract
text.summary: Pins the shape of a published case study object. Agent must satisfy this before returning a draft for publish.

field.name: lessons
field.notes: must include ≥1 thing the author would do differently

field.name: scope_of_client_team
field.notes: what client/other vendors did; may be empty list if truly solo

forbidden.pattern: verbatim_quote that is paraphrased, composite, or generated
outcome_primary_metric without baseline OR without measurement_window
"significant", "substantial", "dramatic", "game-changing" used as the headline outcome word
client_name = "a Fortune 500 company" or "a leading SaaS company" without explicit NDA-anonymization note AND vertical fingerprint
scope_of_client_team empty in a multi-vendor engagement (FTC §255 risk)
multi-engagement roll-up disguised as a single case (engagement_window spans > 12 months OR engagement covers ≥2 distinct deliverables that did not share a brief)
outcome metrics quoted with 3+ significant figures of false precision (e.g. "increased revenue by 247.83%")

allowed-transformations.transformation: Trim verbatim quote for length, marking ellipses; never substitute words.
Anonymize client_name to vertical + size band when consent permits proof but not identity (must record consent_record_id and the anonymization scheme).
Round metrics to ≤2 significant figures where precision implies false accuracy.

list.item: All five CPAOL sections present, in order, named correctly
Outcome primary metric has baseline + post + window + source
Exactly one verbatim quote with name + role + date
scope_of_engagement and scope_of_client_team both populated when multi-party
client_consent_record_id present and resolves to a real record
No banned superlatives as headline outcome words
Lessons section includes ≥1 "would do differently" item
